125 
LTSS_PIHP_MOS 
LABEL: 
Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS) Prepaid Inpatient Health Plan (PIHP) Months 
DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a long-term services and supports (LTSS) PIHP Plan 
in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: LTSS_PIHP_MOS 
LONG NAME: LTSS_PIHP_MOS 
TYPE: 
NUM

3
